# EKCalendarChooserSelectionStyle.single

**Case**

A style that limits users to selecting a single calendar.

## Declaration

```swift
case single
```

## Constants

- **EKCalendarChooserSelectionStyle.multiple**: A style that lets users select multiple calendars.

items.description: A style that lets users select multiple calendars.
items.name: EKCalendarChooserSelectionStyle.multiple
